'''Kalna''' was a young [[Hutt/Legends|Hutt]] who was a member of the Hutt organization [[Ramesh/Legends|Ramesh]] [[Kajidic/Legends|kajidic]] when they killed a leader of the [[Black Bha'lir]] [[Smuggler/Legends|smuggler]] society. Kalna never made it back to his clan, as they were all eradicated by the smugglers. Kalna fled to [[Terman Station]], where he set up a small "protection service" for the local merchants and thugs.
